description_long: This is a three-story urban house with a flat roof and a prominent rectangular chimney structure. The facade features a mix of large and standard-sized windows, with a glass-enclosed porch supported by columns at the main entrance. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color, and the windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and rear elevations. The house includes multiple entry points, with a main door at the front porch and a secondary door at the rear. The overall design is modern and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on clean lines.
description: A modern, three-story urban house with a flat roof, large windows, and a glass-enclosed front porch. The exterior is light-colored and features symmetrical window arrangements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a glass porch, large windows, and the prominent chimney structure.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wall with minimal window openings and the extension of the porch roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with a secondary door, several windows, and the chimney structure visible on the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting additional windows, a large ground-level opening, and the side of the porch.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large and standard windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a glass-enclosed porch with steps and supporting columns, minimal decorative elements.
